Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph P. Brent, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Gordon-Creed, Kelley, Holly & Sugerman, LLP.
No other appearance.

Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Gordon-Creed, Kelley, Holl & Sugerman LLP's Motion To Compel Defendant Mark Gholson To Attend And To Testify At Deposition is granted as Defendant does not oppose the order. Defendant is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be agreed upon by counsel, but not later than February 6, 2008. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $752, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
